opportunities.caption:
Designing for resilience, memory, and a new beginning. Architecture can’t erase loss, but it can help communities heal and move forward. The first of our fire rebuild homes is beginning to take shape in the Palisades, and we are proud to be part of this effort. Thank you @mallisworkshop for making it look easy! 

#rebuildla #palisadesfire #buildingbackbetter #lastrong #constructionupdates

opportunities.comment: Concrete's thermal mass and durability are powerful tools in rebuild—both practically and symbolically. Honored to see thoughtful design leading the way in Palisades recovery.

opportunities.caption:
Comment "Access" to receive our 2026-2027 Private Project Portfolio and Opportunity Deck.

This is what it looks like when a home earns its address. Tucked into the hills of Bel Air, this ground-up estate was conceived to live as quietly as it impresses — floor-to-ceiling steel-frame glass dissolving the line between the great room and the illuminated canyon beyond, bookmatched marble anchoring the fireplace wall, and limestone underfoot that carries the warmth of Southern California inside. The Westside has always set the standard for how modern architecture meets landscape, and this project was built to raise it. Every detail — from the cove-lit ceiling planes to the courtyard pool framed like a canvas — was considered, drawn, and executed by our team. Custom-built modern estates, conceived and delivered ground-up. Comment ACCESS below and we'll send you the private 2026-2027 project portfolio and opportunity deck.

#belairealestate #belairhomes #belairluxury #westsidela #losangelesluxuryhomes #lawestside #belhillluxury #luxuryrealestate #luxuryhomes #milliondollarhomes #luxuryrealestatela #highendrealestate #ultraluxuryhomes #luxuryproperties #modernarchitecture #customhomes #newconstruction #architecturedaily #modernhomedesign #groundupconstruction #luxurylifestyle #dreamhomes #milliondollarviews #aspirationalhomes

opportunities.caption:
Our Upper Marquez Knolls rebuild is really starting to feel like a home. Every week brings another layer of detail, and this one is shaping up to be a true piece of art.

The architecture, natural light, and craftsmanship are all coming together exactly as envisioned. We can't wait for the next phase as the millwork begins to go in and the interiors start to take on their final character.

Stay tuned. The best details are still to come.

opportunities.caption:
California’s statewide median hit an all-time high in April. Los Angeles County moved in the opposite direction. That divergence is worth understanding before making any decision in this market.

Active listings in LA climbed 6.8% year-over-year to 18,482 homes. Supply is up, pricing pressure is real, and the leverage that sellers held in 2021 and 2022 has quietly shifted. Well priced homes are still moving in under three weeks. Overpriced ones are sitting.

No crash is forming, most homeowners carry substantial equity and have no reason to sell at a loss. What is changing is the balance of power between buyers and sellers. If you want to know what that means for your specific zip code, reach out directly.

.
.
.
.
.
#ErfanEstates 
#LuxuryRealEstateLA 
#LALuxuryHomes 
#LosAngelesRealEstate 
#SoCalRealEstate

opportunities.comment: Exactly. The Westside supply shift has reset conversations about what 'premium positioning' actually means now. Scarcity in specific neighborhoods (Malibu, Bel Air) is still real, but the broader LA market is forcing owners to justify price through design and build quality.

opportunities.caption:
@NattyK__ presents this breathtaking oceanfront estate on the shores of Malibu, offering direct beach access, panoramic Pacific views, and refined contemporary living across three levels.

This exceptional residence features 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, floor-to-ceiling glass walls, and multiple ocean-view terraces designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living and unforgettable sunsets.

The chef’s kitchen is fitted with premium appliances and sleek modern cabinetry, while a separate 2-bedroom guest suite with private entrance, full kitchen, and laundry adds flexibility for guests or extended family.
Additional highlights include a 3-car garage, extensive parking, and a prime location moments from hiking trails, restaurants, boutiques, and the best of Malibu coastal living.

🏠 26050 Pacific Coast Hwy
📍 Malibu, CA 90265

Contact @NattyK__ today to arrange a private viewing or request full details.
———
#Keylead #MalibuRealEstate #OceanfrontLiving #LuxuryHomes #CaliforniaLuxury

opportunities.caption:
Revealing the Perugia Residence, a timeless collaboration with Bricoleur.

Discover high-end residential design overlooking the prestigious Bel-Air Country Club in Los Angeles.

The challenge was to masterfully take advantage of the sloping site, creating an entrance at the upper level that provides elevated views just above the tree canopies.

Showcasing the natural materials like premium timber and stone, every frame was crafted to evoke the ultimate luxury and privacy of this unique location.

Experience modern hillside luxury.

Design: @bricoleur_architecture / Bricoleur Architecture 
Visualization: @k2budapest / K2 Visual

#archviz #losangelesarchitecture #belair #k2visual  #architecturehunter

opportunities.comment: The way you've handled the slope—entrance reading above the treeline—is masterful. That's the real luxury: siting and light. Materials feel grounded, not imposed.

opportunities.caption:
Most people think luxury comes from adding more.

More décor.
More furniture.
More details.

But the most luxurious spaces know when to stop.

The secret is restraint.

When every piece has purpose, every material has meaning, and every corner has room to breathe, a home feels calm, timeless, and effortlessly elegant.

Because luxury isn't about filling a space.

It's about creating one.

✨ Negative space = Luxury

Save this for your next home inspiration.

#OrvayaInteriors #LuxuryInteriors #InteriorDesign #MinimalLuxury #luxuryliving

opportunities.comment: This is the concrete philosophy—literally and conceptually. Restraint in material, in form, in ornamentation. That's where modern luxury lives.

opportunities.caption:
Watching the walls go up on one of our Pacific Palisades rebuilds is an exciting milestone. We take great pride in moving projects forward efficiently while maintaining the level of quality and attention to detail our clients expect. Every step completed brings homeowners one step closer to returning home.

This project is progressing at an accelerated pace, and the views certainly aren't hurting. We're grateful for the opportunity to help rebuild this incredible community and look forward to sharing more progress soon.

opportunities.caption:
Not all homes fit into a standard insurance box—and that’s exactly where I come in.

I specialize in High-Value Homes and High-Risk Properties throughout California, helping homeowners in Rancho Santa Fe, Dana Point, Laguna Beach, Pacific Palisades, Newport Coast, Malibu, Beverly Hills, La Jolla, and beyond secure the right coverage while often saving thousands of dollars a year.

From luxury estates and custom-built homes to properties impacted by wildfire and coastal exposures, I help clients navigate today’s challenging insurance market with confidence.

My goal isn’t just to sell a policy—it’s to be a trusted resource and advocate for my clients, making sure they have the protection they need when it matters most.

If you’re a homeowner, real estate professional, wealth advisor, or simply looking for a second opinion on your current insurance program, I’d love to connect.

I’m not your average insurance agent. I specialize in solutions where others often say no. #luxuryhomes #california #maliburealestate #ranchosantafe #highnetworth

opportunities.owner_name: Ellie Peter Team | Real Estate Team
opportunities.caption:
Los Angeles real estate continues to evolve… and opportunities are emerging for both buyers and sellers.

📈 Inventory is improving
🏡 More options are hitting the market
🤝 Negotiation power is returning
💎 Luxury properties continue to show resilience

The days of blindly overbidding on every home may be behind us. Today’s market rewards preparation, strategy, and local expertise.

Whether you’re considering buying, selling, investing, or simply curious about where the market is headed, we’re here to help you navigate it with confidence.

Thinking about making a move in 2026? Let’s talk.

📍 Los Angeles & Orange County
📩 DM us for a personalized market analysis.

#LosAngelesRealEstate #LALuxuryRealEstate #LuxuryHomesLA #LosAngelesHomes #RealEstateMarket

opportunities.comment: Totally agree on the shift—preparation wins now. For luxury westside builds, this cycle is actually clarifying what truly differentiates a property: location, materials, and timeless design over speculation.

opportunities.caption:
Brutalistische woning in beton en baksteen met uitzicht over een meer via grote aluminium raampartijen die de grens tussen binnen en buiten doen vervagen. Toch slaagde de architect erin om een warme en intieme woonsfeer te creëren. ⁠
⁠
Zichtbeton, karaktervolle Wasserstrich-baksteen en natuurlijke materialen geven de woning haar sterke identiteit. Grote glaspartijen halen het landschap naar binnen, terwijl natuursteen, hout en maatwerk zorgen voor een warme en rustige woonbeleving. ⁠
⁠
Architect @ArchitectsInMotion⁠
Fotografie @hendrikbiegs⁠
baksteen @wienerbergerbelgium⁠
buitenschrijnwerk @BeerseAluminiumWerken⁠
@gira.belgie schakelaars⁠
@gaggenauofficial keukentoestellen ⁠
⁠
#brutalistarchitecture #concretearchitecture #lakehousearch #contemporaryresidential #hasselt
opportunities.caption_excerpt:

⁠
Zich…
opportunities.comment: The way raw concrete and warm brick hold space together—and those aluminium frames dissolving the edge between interior and landscape. That's the balance everyone chases in Westside homes.

opportunities.caption:
Sometimes it’s not the big moments that stay with you forever. Sometimes it’s just the ocean, a quiet sunset and the feeling that everything inside you slows down. 🫠🧡

This Malibu sunset felt familiar — calm, grounding and peaceful. No noise, no pressure, no chasing. Just a moment that reminded me how beautiful simple things can be.

And honestly… that was enough. 🌅

#malibu #california #usa #sunset #malibusunset #californiadreaming #westcoast #pacificocean #travel #travelgram #goodvibes #positiveenergy #oceanview #goldenhour #beachvibes #sunsetlover #wanderlust #peacefulmind #naturelovers #vacationmode #summerfeelings #earthfocus #cali #malibubeach #malibulife #sunset #sunsets #travel #sunsetphotography #travelphotography
